questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The city of Calcutta was a major hub of colonial trade and commerce.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It was the seat of the British East India Company's trade operations in India.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Calcutta's status as a major hub of colonial trade and commerce can be attributed to the British East India Company's operations being centered there.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Bombay was a major port city during the colonial period.
